recoder.service.SourceInfo

Packages that use SourceInfo
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl
RIFL is short for "Requirements for Information Flow Language", a tool-indepentent specification language developed in the RS3 project.
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

    protected SourceInfo
    KeYCrossReferenceServiceConfiguration.makeSourceInfo()
    The cross reference source info is a subclass of the source info, so this class simply overrides the source info factory method.

    The cross reference source info is a subclass of the source info, so this class simply overrides the source info factory method.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected SourceInfo
    Transformation.getSourceInfo()
    Returns the source info service contained in the service configuration.
    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type SourceInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Problem
    MethodKit.checkMethodDeclaration(NameInfo ni, SourceInfo si, TypeDeclaration context, MethodDeclaration candidate)
    Query that finds out problems before inserting a new method declaration.
    static DocComment
    CommentKit.createDoc(SourceInfo si, NameInfo ni, FieldDeclaration field, boolean dummy)
    Factory method creating an empty or faked comment conforming to JavaDoc conventions for the given field declaration.
    static TypeReference
    TypeKit.createTypeReference(SourceInfo si, Type t, ProgramElement context)
    Factory method that creates a new type reference derived by the name of the given type and tries to minimize its qualification using the given context for the type reference.
    static String
    VariableKit.createValidVariableName(SourceInfo si, ProgramElement context)
    creates a new variable name which does not exist within the given scope.
    static String
    VariableKit.createValidVariableName(SourceInfo si, ProgramElement context, String guess)
    creates a new variable name which does not exist within the given scope using the given guess as a name base.
    static VariableReference
    VariableKit.createVariableReference(SourceInfo si, Variable v, ProgramElement context)
    Factory method that creates a minimal qualified reference to the given variable (or field) for the given context.
    static Import
    UnitKit.ensureImport(ChangeHistory ch, SourceInfo si, String typeName, ProgramElement context)
    Deprecated.
    needs further testing - use at your own risks
    static void
    UnitKit.ensureImports(ChangeHistory ch, SourceInfo si, ProgramElement root)
    Deprecated.
    needs further testing - use at your own risks
    static List<Statement>
    StatementKit.getExits(MemberDeclaration mdecl, SourceInfo si)
    For a method declaration or class initializer, returns a list of block exits, such as return or throw statements, and the body if its exit is reachable.
    static List<MethodDeclaration>
    MethodKit.getGetters(SourceInfo si, FieldSpecification f)
    Query that tries to identify getter methods for the given field within the class declaration of the given field.
    static String
    VariableKit.getNewVariableName(SourceInfo si, Type type, ProgramElement context)
    Query method that finds a name for a new variable with the given type.
    static String[]
    VariableKit.getNewVariableNames(SourceInfo si, Type[] types, ProgramElement context)
    Query method that finds names for new variables with the given types.
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getRedundantExceptions(SourceInfo si, Throws t)
    Query that returns all redundant exceptions of the specified throws clause.
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getRedundantSuperInterfaces(SourceInfo si, TypeDeclaration td)
    Query that returns all redundant super interfaces of the specified type declaration.
    static boolean
    StatementKit.hasReachableEnd(StatementBlock block, SourceInfo si)
    Checks if the end of the specified statement block is reachable as defined in the static language semantics.
    static boolean
    StatementKit.isReachable(Statement s, SourceInfo si)
    Checks if the specified statement is reachable as defined in the static language semantics.
    static boolean
    ModifierKit.makeVisible(ChangeHistory ch, SourceInfo si, MemberDeclaration mdecl, ClassType ct)
    Deprecated.
    will be replaced; does not make visible redefined members
    static void
    StatementKit.preparePrepend(ChangeHistory ch, SourceInfo si, ExpressionJumpStatement returnOrThrow)
    Deprecated.
    will become a first class transformation
    static boolean
    ExpressionKit.shiftPreceedingStatementExpressions(SourceInfo si, Expression x, ChangeHistory ch)
    Deprecated.
    replaced by transformation
